questions.text: What consensus mechanism does Solana use to achieve high throughput?
questions.explanation: Solana uses Proof of History (PoH) as a cryptographic clock to order transactions, combined with Tower BFT consensus.

questions.text: What is the primary advantage of compressed NFTs on Solana?
options: They cost significantly less to mint at scale
They can only be held by validators
questions.explanation: Compressed NFTs use Merkle trees to reduce storage costs by ~100-500x, making large-scale distribution practical.

questions.text: Which programming language is used to write Solana smart contracts (programs)?
questions.explanation: Solana programs are primarily written in Rust, compiled to BPF bytecode, and deployed on-chain.

questions.text: What does an AI agent need to interact with a Solana program?
options: An IDL (Interface Description Language) and RPC connection
questions.explanation: AI agents use the program's IDL to serialize/deserialize instructions and communicate via RPC.

questions.text: What is the deposit commitment concept in BeThere?
options: Attendees pay for their NFT badge
Attendees lock a deposit, get it back when they show up
Staff pay to use the scanner
questions.explanation: BeThere's deposit model: attendees commit money upfront, get refunded when they show up and complete the quiz. No-shows forfeit their deposit.
